mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM movie WHERE year < 2016 ORDER BY year;

SELECT m.name, m.movieID, m.popular, m.year FROM movie m INNER JOIN ( SELECT year, MAX(CAST(popular AS SIGNED)) AS max_popular FROM movie WHERE year < 2016 GROUP BY year ) ranked ON ranked.year = m.year AND ranked.max_popular = CAST(m.popular AS SIGNED) WHERE m.year < 2016 ORDER BY m.year;

SELECT y.year, COALESCE(c.cnt, 0) AS movieID, #{tag} AS genre FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT year FROM movie WHERE year < 2016 ) y LEFT JOIN ( SELECT year, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM movie WHERE year < 2016
AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','动作','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','动画','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','喜剧','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','犯罪','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','科幻','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','历史','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','音乐','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','爱情','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','悬疑','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','惊悚','%')
AND genre LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
GROUP BY year ) c ON c.year = y.year ORDER BY y.year;

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','动作','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS action_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','动画','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS animation_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','喜剧','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS comedy_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','犯罪','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS crime_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','科幻','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS science_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','历史','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS history_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','音乐','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS music_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','爱情','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS romance_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','悬疑','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS mystery_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre LIKE CONCAT('%','惊悚','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS thriller_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','动作','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','动画','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','喜剧','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','犯罪','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','科幻','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','历史','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','音乐','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','爱情','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','悬疑','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','惊悚','%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS other_count FROM movie WHERE 1 = 1
AND year = #{year}

SELECT m.genre FROM movie m INNER JOIN usrrate_none r ON r.movid = m.movieID WHERE r.nickname = #{nickname} UNION ALL SELECT m.genre FROM movie m INNER JOIN comments c ON c.movieID = m.movieID WHERE c.nickname = #{nickname}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS movieID, year, #{tag} AS genre FROM movie WHERE 1 = 1
AND year = #{year}
AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','动作','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','动画','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','喜剧','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','犯罪','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','科幻','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','历史','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','音乐','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','爱情','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','悬疑','%') AND genre NOT LIKE CONCAT('%','惊悚','%')
AND genre LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
